- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (Recreated after scaffolding.)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (User requested a minimalist multi-page form webapp with Supabase backend, admin view, and printable output.)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Vite React TS app created via create-vite; dependencies installed.)

- [x] Customize the Project (Implemented multi-page form, Supabase integration, admin view, and print-ready output.)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (No extensions required.)

- [x] Compile the Project (npm run build + npm run lint)

- [x] Create and Run Task (Not required for this Vite app.)

- [x] Launch the Project (Started Vite dev server.)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README updated; comments cleaned.)
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
